title: Heart & Home Twin Wick Candle and Carousel Gift Set - Vegan Friendly Soy Blend for Gifting and Home Fragrance
features: Twin Wick candle with carousel included.
Christmas Magic has notes of zesty orange and comforting spices.
Twin cotton wicks for a clean burn up to 40 hours.
Carousel with bauble-shaped charms that gently spin in the warm glow.
description: Product description This can solve all of your christmas present dilemmas! The sumptuous scent of our Christmas Magic twin Wick candle with a fragrance-rich signature soy blend wax which is renewable, sustainable, and kinder to the environment. With notes of zesty orange and comforting spices, evoking warmth and festive enchantment in every flicker. This fabulous gift has a fabulous Carousel included to make the ultimate christmas gift set. Experience the magical effect created when the Heart and Home candle is lit and the pretty bauble-shaped charms gently spin in the warm candle glow. With up to 40 hours of burn time, this really is the perfect Christmas decoration to grace the home during the festive season and will become a cherished keepsake to treasure for years to come. Gift set includes; 1x Christmas Magic Twin Wick Candle 1x Twin wick candle carousel Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave unattended. Burn for no more than 4 hours at a time. Discontinue use when 1/2 inch of wax remains. Never leave a burning candle near children or pets. Always extinguish candles when leaving the room or going to sleep.
